title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Drishti Eye Care

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Drishti Eye Care
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!
